name: remotion-engine
description: Motor de renderizado de videos con Remotion — sin interfaz visual

scripts.render:hello: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--use-system-ca tsx src/render.ts HelloWorld out/hello.mp4
scripts.render:right-botines: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--use-system-ca tsx src/render.ts RightBotines out/right-botines.mp4
scripts.render:right-botines-vertical: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--use-system-ca tsx src/render.ts RightBotinesVertical out/right-botines-vertical.mp4
scripts.render:northzone: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--use-system-ca tsx src/render.ts NorthzoneVideo out/northzone.mp4

author: facuguz55
